name: Reasoning Trace Draft Dataset
description: Author legacy-compatible reasoning drafts as prompt, optional thinking, and final answer. Use trace-migrate to create hash-sealed TraceRecords and trace-review before training generated records.

fields.name: prompt
fields.description: The task or user question presented to the model.

fields.name: thinking
fields.description: Explicit reasoning supplied for training. Generated reasoning is unverified until separately reviewed.

fields.name: answer
fields.description: The final answer, kept separate from the reasoning.

example.thinking: Break 23 into 20 plus 3: 17 times 20 is 340 and 17 times 3 is 51; 340 plus 51 is 391.
